name: 72" Bookcase Traditional With Three Open Shelves and Cabinet Classic White - Room Essentials™
description:
Bring a touch of vintage charm to your study or living room with this Open-Top Bookcase with Storage from Room Essentials™. Supported by a wooden frame, this rectangular bookcase has four open shelves to store books, magazines and more, and it also has a lower two-door cabinet to store a variety of everyday items. Plus, the white finish makes it easy to integrate into any room's decor scheme.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Detailed Dimensions:

Overall Height: 72.17 inches
Overall Depth: 13.98 inches
Height of closed storage: 28.94 inches
Height of open storage: 43.23 inches
Distance from floor to bottom: 3.35 inches
Distance between front legs: 26.38 inches
Distance between front leg and back leg: 10.75 inches
Width of door: 13.01 inches
Height of door: 23.35 inches
Distance from shelf to bottom in storage: 11.45 inches
Distance from shelf to top in storage: 11.45 inches
Distance from upper shelf to top: 12.99 inches
Distance between two upper shelves: 13.11 inches
Distance from lower shelf to middle shelf: 15.23 inches
